digest.en: Romania reports drone fragments damaged property during Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine. Iran's foreign minister is waiting for a US delegation in Pakistan for peace talks. The US and Iran are set to hold a second round of talks in Islamabad.
digest.hi: जनरल नरवणे ने कहा कि सरकार को सेना पर पूरा भरोसा है और ऑपरेशन के दौरान फौज को पूरी छूट दी जाती है। भारत ने सुरक्षा परिषद के ढांचे में तत्काल व्यापक सुधार की आवश्यकता पर जोर दिया। चीन पर दबाव बढ़ाने की अमेरिकी रणनीति में भारत एक अहम ताकत बन रहा है।

articles.title: Romania says drone fragments damage property during overnight Russian attack on Ukraine
articles.summary: Romania's Defence Ministry condemned Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine, which damaged property with drone fragments, posing a new challenge to regional security. The Defence Ministry firmly condemns the irresponsible actions of the Russian Federation and emphasises that these represent ​a new challenge ‌to regional security and stability in the Black Sea area.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister awaits U.S. delegation to Pakistan for peace talks
articles.summary: Iran's Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad for peace talks, awaiting a US delegation including Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Iran's Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on Friday, as the White House confirmed Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel there Saturday to try to "move the ball forward towards a deal.".

articles.title: Witkoff and Kushner headed to Pakistan for Iran talks: White House
articles.summary: The White House confirmed Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for Iran talks. Witkoff and Kushner headed to Pakistan for Iran talks: White House.

articles.title: Capture of ships by US, Iran violates international law, shipping body says
articles.summary: The International Chamber of Shipping director said the US and Iran should release captured vessel crews, as their actions violate international law. US and Iran should immediately release crews of captured vessels, says International Chamber of Shipping director.

articles.title: No clarity on U.S.-Iran talks as Islamabad stays under lockdown
articles.summary: Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister expressed hope for meaningful engagements between the US and Iran to promote regional peace and stability. Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Dar, in a social media post, expressed hope for "meaningful engagements" between the two warring parties to promote regional peace and stability.

articles.title: U.S. negotiators to go to Islamabad, but Iran says no direct talks
articles.summary: US negotiators will travel to Islamabad, but Iran has ruled out direct talks. U. S. negotiators to go to Islamabad, but Iran says no direct talks.

articles.title: Lakers down Rockets in overtime for 3-0 series lead, Celtics beat Sixers
articles.summary: Lakers lead their series 3-0 after beating Rockets in overtime. Elsewhere in the NBA playoffs, Spurs beat Trail Blazers 120-108 without Victor Wembanyama to take a 2-1 series lead. Lakers down Rockets in overtime for 3-0 series lead, Celtics beat Sixers.

articles.title: Colombia, Venezuela hold key talks in post-Maduro visit
articles.summary: Colombian President Gustavo Petro visited Caracas, securing military cooperation with Venezuela to combat border mafias. This marks Petro's first visit since Nicolas Maduro's removal. Colombia and Venezuela announced military cooperation to combat border "mafias" during President Gustavo Petro's visit to Caracas.

articles.title: US, Iran To Hold 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today. What's On Agenda
articles.summary: Iran and the US will hold a second round of peace talks in Pakistan. The previous round occurred on April 11-12, amid a delicate ceasefire. The previous round of talks was held on April 11-12.

articles.title: What’s at stake for Iran and the US in Islamabad?
articles.summary: Iran's foreign minister is in Islamabad, with US envoys also arriving. Iran’s foreign minister is in Islamabad, with US envoys also on the way. What’s at stake for Iran and the US in Islamabad?

articles.title: Prince Harry Says Will 'Always Be Part Of Royal Family'
articles.summary: Prince Harry said he will "always be part of the royal family". He plans to remain a "working royal", carrying out official engagements as a senior family member. "Working royal" is a senior member of the royal family who carries out official engagements.

articles.title: Trump Spokeswoman Announces Maternity Leave, No Stand-In Named
articles.summary: White House spokeswoman Karoline Waltz announced maternity leave, but no temporary replacement was named. The White House did not confirm the duration of her leave. The White House has not confirmed for how long she will be out.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister arrives in Pakistan, Trump expects offer satisfying US demands
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Hossein Amir-Abdollahian arrived in Pakistan. The White House announced special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for talks. Iran says it has no plans to meet US officials, while the White House says special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan on Saturday (Apr 25) for talks.

articles.title: What’s happening on day 57 as Trump dispatches negotiating team?
articles.summary: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for Iran peace talks, as Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad. The US negotiating team's visit aims to revive stalled talks.

articles.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: US envoys to go to Pakistan for peace talks but Iran says no direct
articles.summary: Tehran's foreign minister arrived in Islamabad for talks as US envoys prepared to travel. US Iran War News Live Updates: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks.

articles.title: US imposes sanctions on Chinese 'teapot' refinery for buying Iranian oil
articles.summary: The US imposed sanctions on Hengli Petrochemical for buying Iranian oil. The Treasury Department targeted Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Refinery, which it said is one of Iran's largest customers of crude oil and petroleum products.

articles.title: Singaporean wrestler Dante Chen released by WWE
articles.summary: WWE released Singaporean wrestler Dante Chen, whose real name is Sean Tan. The 30-year-old, whose real name is Sean Tan, announced his WWE release on X. Singaporean wrestler Dante Chen released by WWE.

articles.title: Hezbollah defiant in face of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extension
articles.summary: Hezbollah's leader vowed to continue fighting Israel despite an extension of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire. The agreement, brokered by the United Nations, aims to reduce tensions between the two nations. Lebanon's government has yet to comment on the development.

articles.title: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
articles.summary: European Nato allies pushed back against a reported US threat to withdraw troops from Spain. The move would be a significant escalation of tensions between the US and its European partners. Spain's government has not confirmed the threat.

articles.title: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks
articles.summary: US envoys will travel to Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, following a visit by Iran's foreign minister. The move comes amid rising tensions in the region. Israeli air strikes in Gaza killed at least 12 Palestinians, including six police officers.

articles.title: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
articles.summary: Thousands of people in Nepal are at risk due to a multi-million dollar flood warning system at Imja glacial lake that has not been maintained since 2016. The system was installed to prevent a catastrophic flood, but locals claim it has been left to rust.

articles.summary: ट्रंप के हमलों पर भारत की प्रतिक्रिया नपी-तुली रही, कांग्रेस ने इसे कमजोर बताया। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने वाले पोस्ट को लेकर कई प्रतिक्रियाएं आ रही हैं.

articles.summary: अमेरिका ने पश्चिम एशिया में बड़ी सेना उतारी है. सेंट्रल कमांड की पोस्ट ने तीन विमान वाहक, सैनिक, और लड़ाकू जेट तैनात किए हैं. यह तैनाती ईरान के साथ तनाव के बीच हुई है.

articles.title: 23 अप्रैल, 2026 को विश्व आर्थिक समाचारों की मुख्य बातें
articles.summary: विश्व आर्थिक समाचारों में 23 अप्रैल, 2026 को कई महत्वपूर्ण घटनाएं हुईं। इनमें विभिन्न देशों की आर्थिक नीतियों और वैश्विक बाजारों की गतिविधियों पर अपडेट शामिल हैं। 23 अप्रैल, 2026 को विश्व आर्थिक समाचारों की मुख्य बातें Vietnam. vn।

articles.title: 'बांग्लादेश से संबंध अलग, अवैध बांग्लादेशियों का मामला अलग, कूटनीति से ऊपर देशहित'- NDTV से बोले
articles.summary: नितिन नवीन ने कहा बांग्लादेश से संबंध और अवैध बांग्लादेशियों का मामला अलग है, देशहित कूटनीति से ऊपर है। 'बांग्लादेश से संबंध अलग, अवैध बांग्लादेशियों का मामला अलग, कूटनीति से ऊपर देशहित'- NDTV से बोले नितिन नवीन NDTV. in।

articles.title: 'असली साजिशकर्ताओं को सजा मिली या न्याय अंतरराष्ट्रीय कूटनीति की भेंट चढ़ गया', पहलगाम हमले की बरसी
articles.summary: पहलगाम हमले की बरसी पर, Navjivan ने सवाल उठाया कि क्या असली साजिशकर्ताओं को सजा मिली या न्याय अंतरराष्ट्रीय कूटनीति की भेंट चढ़ गया। 'असली साजिशकर्ताओं को सजा मिली या न्याय अंतरराष्ट्रीय कूटनीति की भेंट चढ़ गया', पहलगाम हमले की बरसी पर सरकार से सवाल Navjivan।

articles.title: 'ट्रंप जब चाहेंगे तब खत्म होगा युद्ध, 3-5 दिन की डेडलाइन की खबरें गलत', पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष पर
articles.summary: पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष पर, व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा कि 3-5 दिन की डेडलाइन की खबरें गलत हैं और ट्रंप जब चाहेंगे तब युद्ध खत्म होगा। 'ट्रंप जब चाहेंगे तब खत्म होगा युद्ध, 3-5 दिन की डेडलाइन की खबरें गलत', पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष पर व्हाइट हाउस का बयान AajTak।

articles.title: ईरान पर अमेरिका-इज़रायल हमलों का 54वां दिन: संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास, हमले जारी और कूटनीति
articles.summary: अमेरिका और इज़रायल के हमलों के 54वें दिन, ईरान में संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास और हमले जारी हैं। कूटनीतिक प्रयास जारी हैं लेकिन स्थिति अनिश्चित बनी हुई है। ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच तनाव कम होने के संकेत नहीं मिल रहे हैं।

articles.title: इसे कहते हैं कूटनीति! पीस वार्ता पर लकड़ी लेकर 'फंसा' पाकिस्तान, उड़ता तीर यूं ही नहीं भारत ने छोड़ा
articles.summary: पाकिस्तान शांति वार्ता में लकड़ी लेकर फंस गया है। भारत ने इसे कूटनीतिक चाल बताया है। पाकिस्तान की इस चाल का जवाब भारत ने उड़ता तीर से दिया है। इसे कहते हैं कूटनीति!

articles.title: युद्ध में अब तक कितना पैसा फूंक चुका अमेरिका, जानिए अब कैसे करेगा इसकी भरपाई?
articles.summary: अमेरिका ने युद्ध में अब तक बड़ी मात्रा में पैसा खर्च किया है। अमेरिका अब इसकी भरपाई के तरीकों पर विचार कर रहा है। इसके लिए अमेरिका को अपनी आर्थिक रणनीति में बदलाव करना पड़ सकता है।
